query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Blithe', 'Showing casual and cheerful indifference', 'The reviewer described the tone as blithe, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Blithesome', 'Happy or spriteful, carefree', 'The essay highlights the blithesome of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bloat', 'Swollen, puffed up', 'Her bloat became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Blockade', 'An obstruction of passage or progress', 'Her blockade became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bluff', 'To mislead by a display of self-confidence or strength', 'Over time, the community learned to bluff its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Blunder', 'To make a stupid mistake', 'Over time, the community learned to blunder its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Blunderbuss', 'An action regarded as lacking in subtlety', 'Her blunderbuss became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Blurt', 'To speak quickly or without thought', 'The author hoped the new policy would blurt tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Boatswain', 'An officer on a vessel, in charge of rigging, cables, etc', 'Scholars noted a striking boatswain between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bode', 'To indicate by signs, as future events', 'Critics argued that the plan might bode the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bodice', 'The part of a woman''s dress covering between neck and waist', 'The essay highlights the bodice of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bodily', 'Of, relating to, or concerning the body', 'He bodily overlooked details that later proved decisive.', 'adverb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bogus', 'Counterfeit or fake, not genuine', 'Her bogus became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Boisterous', 'Noisy, energetic, and cheerful', 'The reviewer described the tone as boisterous, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bole', 'The trunk or stem of a tree', 'Her bole became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bolero', 'A lively spanish dance', 'The essay highlights the bolero of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Boll', 'The rounded seed-bearing capsule of a cotton or flax plant', 'The essay highlights the boll of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bolster', 'To support or strengthen something', '“The government provided funds to bolster the struggling economy.”', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bomb', 'To attack using one or more bombs, to bombard', 'Critics argued that the plan might bomb the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bombard', 'To attack something with bombs or other missiles', 'Critics argued that the plan might bombard the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bombardier', 'A bomber crew member who sights and releases bombs', 'The essay highlights the bombardier of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bombast', 'High-sounding language with little meaning', 'The essay highlights the bombast of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bombastic', 'High-sounding but with little meaning', 'The reviewer described the tone as bombastic, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bondage', 'The state of being enslaved or the practice of slavery', 'Scholars noted a striking bondage between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Boom', 'Having a great period of prosperity', 'The passage presents a boom portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Boon', 'A thing that is helpful or beneficial', 'Her boon became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Boor', 'A rude, unmannerly person', 'The essay highlights the boor of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Borough', 'A fortified town, a town or city', 'Scholars noted a striking borough between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bosom', 'In a very close relationship', 'Her bosom became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Botanize', 'To study plants or plant life', 'Critics argued that the plan might botanize the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Botany', 'The scientific study of plants, a branch of biology', 'Her botany became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bountiful', 'Having a quantity or amount that is generous or plentiful', 'The reviewer described the tone as bountiful, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bourgeoi', 'A member of the middle class', 'Her bourgeoi became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bovine', 'Of, relating to, or affecting cattle', 'Scholars noted a striking bovine between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bowdlerize', 'To remove those parts of a text considered offensive, vulgar', 'Over time, the community learned to bowdlerize its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bowler', 'One who engages in the sport of bowling', 'Her bowler became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Boycott', 'To abstain, either as an individual or group', 'Over time, the community learned to boycott its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brackish', 'Salty or slightly salty, as a mixture of fresh and sea water', 'Her brackish became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brae', 'The sloping bank of a river-valley, any slope or hillside', 'Scholars noted a striking brae between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Braggart', 'Someone who boasts', 'The essay highlights the braggart of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brandish', 'To move or swing a weapon back and forth', 'The author hoped the new policy would brandish tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brash', 'Impetuous or rash', 'The essay highlights the brash of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bravado', 'A swaggering show of defiance or courage', 'Scholars noted a striking bravado between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brawn', 'Strong, well-developed muscles', 'Her brawn became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bray', 'Of a donkey, to make it cry', 'Critics argued that the plan might bray the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Braze', 'The joining together of two metal pieces without melting', 'Her braze became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brazen', 'Bold and without shame', 'What seemed brazen at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brazier', 'A barbecue', 'The essay highlights the brazier of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Breach', 'An act of breaking a law, agreement or code of conduct', 'Her breach became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Breadth', 'The extent or measure of how broad or wide something is', 'The essay highlights the breadth of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
